title: krainzia longiflora subsp. stampferi
intro: Krainzia longiflora subsp. stampferi, also known as the Krainzia longiflora stampferi, is a plant species of the genus Krainzia. This plant is a subspecies of Krainzia longiflora, which is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae).
